title: Introduction to High Performance Computing
description: A practical course on HPC systems, cluster architecture, middleware, parallel programming, AI workloads, observability, security, and optimization.
outcomes: Explain how HPC clusters are organized from hardware through applications.
Select the right parallel programming and scheduling model for common workloads.
Interpret performance, monitoring, and security signals in a production cluster.
Build a mental model for running AI and scientific applications at scale.
